notes.n4: Official Audi Germany-market material now confirms the exact late-cycle TT Coupé 45 TFSI quattro S tronic 180 kW mapping: quattro AWD with electronically controlled multi-plate clutch, 7-speed S tronic, forward ratios 3.400 / 2.750 / 1.767 / 0.925 / 0.705 / 0.755 / 0.635, reverse 2.900, dual final-drive values 4.471 / 3.304, and a 225/50 R17 basic tire.
